svg.title: socialIO — Redis data model and key structures
svg.desc: Four Redis data structures used in the chat app: pub/sub channels, typing keys, presence hashes, and message cache sorted sets
svg.text: Redis — four key families, each a different data structure

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Redis pub/sub work for WebSocket fan-out?')

svg.text: one channel per conversation · no TTL · ephemeral

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the typing indicator TTL work in Redis?')

svg.text: scan pattern to find all typers in a conv

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Redis track user presence and online status?')
sendPrompt('How does the Redis message cache sorted set work?')

svg.text: stops typing — key auto-expires in 5 s
